audio_clips.text: V Create Digital presents Being a Kid Again.

For the purposes of this video, the top end is the side furthest away from you and the bottom end is the side closest to you. Use a square piece of origami paper oriented with a straight edge towards you. Rotate the square piece of paper 90 degrees to make it into a diamond shape. Take the top corner of the paper at the top and fold it down to the bottom corner and crease. It should make a triangle.

Rotate the triangle 90 degrees to the left. The triangle is then folded into a smaller triangle by bringing the top corner down to the bottom corner. Press down on the top folded edge to form a crease.

Unfold the triangle and rotate it so that the point is at the top and the base is at the bottom. Fold the triangle left to the crease 45 degrees so that the left corner hangs over the edge halfway down the left side forming a point at the crease. Fold the triangle right of the crease 45 degrees so that the right corner hangs over the edge, halfway down the right side, forming a point at the crease. Then flip the paper face down and rotate 180 degrees. You should have one pointed edge nearest you and three pointed edges facing away from you. Fold the pointed area in the center on the side furthest away from you down about the length of a thumb. Fold the pointed area on the side closest to you down about the length of a thumb. The paper is flipped face up again and rotated 180 degrees. Two small dots are drawn near the top center on either side of the crease to make eyes. A small horizontal oval is drawn below the eyes at the crease to represent a dog nose. Right below the nose, a small upper curve is drawn to the right and a small upper curve is drawn to the left. The final product of a dog is shown.
Thanks for watching the video. Subscribe at youtube.com forward slash being a kid again.

video_name: How to make an origami dog face step by step.
